content.en:
"Wanfa Daozi has actually stepped into the eight-star peak god general's combat power!!!"

In the great universe, countless gods and heavenly monarchs were shocked.

Before, although Ye Tian's progress was fast, it was not too rebellious, after all, in the chaos, as long as there were resources, his strength would improve quickly.

It's like a Dao Ancestor, if you really want to cultivate a god general, you can upgrade a one-star god general to an eight-star god general within a thousand years, this is the horror of resources and Dao Ancestor inheritance.

Of course, Dao Ancestor would not forcibly and quickly improve the strength of his disciples, otherwise he would invert the foundation and damage it.

But even if it is a Dao Ancestor, there is no way for a god general to enter the eight-star peak god general's combat power in a short period of time.

In the midst of chaos, the real peerless Tianjiao can enter the combat power of the eight-star god general in a short time, but the gap between the eight-star early stage god general and the eight-star peak god general is very large, even bigger than the gap of the previous realm.

Those Dao Ancestor Ancestors and other peerless Heavenly Pride, if they want to be promoted to the eight-star peak god general's combat power, it will also take a long time.

How long does it take for a genius to cultivate?

Not to mention hundreds of thousands of years, even if it is millions of years, that's not a long time.

Just like the Yunzi Divine Maiden, she definitely belongs to the top group among the Dao Ancestors, but she still belongs to the eight-star early stage god generals, and she doesn't know how long it will take to be from the eight-star peak god generals.

All of a sudden, many god generals and heavenly monarchs were talking about Ye Tian.

"The talent of the Ten Thousand Laws Daozi is too terrifying, right, he has achieved an eight-star peak god general in such a short time, and he won't soon step into a nine-star god general, right?"

"The nine-star god general can defeat the general peak of the Heavenly Mandate, and it is an incomparably rare god general in the chaos, and it will take a long time and countless opportunities for the Dao Ancestor to do it, and the Ten Thousand Laws Dao Zi is in the big universe, and many opportunities cannot be enjoyed, and it should have taken countless foundations to be able to step into the eight-star peak god general, I am afraid that the progress will not be very fast in the future!"

"Wanfa Daozi can become an eight-star peak god general so quickly, and there are still people who dare to underestimate Wanfa Daozi? Don't use general ideas to measure Wanfa Daozi, it is a Dao ancestor hand-me-down, and it is a native creature of the great universe, an ordinary native creature of the universe, how can it be qualified to be accepted by the Dao ancestor as the Dao Ancestor's personal inheritance, it must be extremely demonic. Moreover, don't forget, once the Ten Thousand Laws Daozi is detached, the potential will rise to a notch, and the potential of the detached person at the level of the nine-star god general is far beyond that of the ordinary nine-star god general!"

"That's right, Wanfa Daozi is a native creature of the universe, and now he is qualified to transcend. If he is detached, his potential will rise a notch, which is a big advantage!"

"If we are also native beings of the universe, if we are detached, wouldn't we also be able to detach, and our potential will rise by one or several grades!"

"Hehe, how difficult it is for the native beings of the universe to cultivate, it is much more difficult than cultivating in the chaos, and it is even more difficult for the great universe to transcend, and it is difficult for ordinary eight-star early and mid-stage gods to transcend. If we were born in the universe, how difficult it would be to transcend it!"

......

Ye Tian didn't care about other people's discussions, he was still cultivating in the Purple Light World, but his position changed, and he went a little deeper into the Purple Light World.

After all, the outermost purple light was already difficult to erode his physical body, and the effect of auxiliary cultivation was not very good.

Therefore, Ye Tian could only go deep into the purple light world.

Year after year passed, Ye Tian had been cultivating in the Purple Light World, and he had not explored the Purple Light World.

He still wants to be safe at the moment, after all, the purple light world is too dangerous, although there are countless opportunities and countless treasures, but it is too dangerous, even if it is the Heavenly Monarch List, there is a possibility of the fall of the Heavenly Monarch, and he is naturally nothing if he is only an eight-star peak god general.

But Ye Tian also knew very well that it would be very difficult for the eight-star peak god general to be promoted to the nine-star god, the Xuanxuan Jue would not progress quickly, and it would be difficult to improve again, unless he stepped into the realm of the Heavenly Mandate, he could easily improve the realm of the Xuanxuan Jue.

Therefore, at the level of a god general, Ye Tian wanted to improve his strength with the help of Xuan Xuan Jue, which was almost delusional.

It is difficult to improve the physical body, the increase in soul strength is not large, and the divine power is almost to the limit, the Void Heaven Dao Body needs to be engraved with Dao patterns to improve, and he can't collect too many Chaos Divine Powers at present, so it is more difficult for the Void Heaven Dao Body to improve.

Therefore, it was very difficult for Ye Tian to quickly improve his strength.

In fact, not only Ye Tian, but also the other eight-star gods have reached this level, and they have been raised to the limit in all aspects, it is too difficult to continue to improve their strength, otherwise, the nine-star gods will not be so rare.

The eight-star god general, who really wants to quickly improve his strength, has only two directions.

The first is to improve the attainment of the Great Divine Power, Ye Tian's Great Divine Power Great Immortal Technique and Great Destruction Technique have been cultivated to the Dacheng realm, if it goes further, the strength will transform again.

If Ye Tian masters an extreme divine power, then his strength is the real transformation, and it can even be said that as long as Ye Tian masters an extreme divine power, even if he has no progress in other aspects, he can instantly step into the ranks of the nine-star divine generals.

In the chaos, most of the nine-star god generals have extreme divine powers, if they don't have extreme divine powers, it is difficult to advance their strength to the ranks of the nine-star god generals, which is almost a shackle.

That's why extreme talent is so important.

But it is very difficult to cultivate a great divine power to the extreme level, and it must be at the level of three thousand great divine powers, if it is those weakened versions of the great divine powers of the universe, it is not very powerful to cultivate to the extreme level.

At present, the great immortal technique, the great destruction technique, and the constant light divine power that have helped Ye Tian's combat power a lot, and although the great god arithmetic is awesome, it can't increase the battle, so Ye Tian naturally won't spend too much thought.

"The Great Immortal Technique has the greatest increase in strength, so first improve the Great Immortal Technique!"

Ye Tian decided.

As for the Chaos Divine Power, it is currently in a rudimentary state, and there is no way to increase its power, so to a certain extent, it is not as good as the Great Divine Power of the Dacheng Realm.

If it weren't for the Chaos Divine Power, which had an improving effect on the Void Heaven Dao Body, otherwise he wouldn't have wasted time cultivating the Chaos Divine Power.

In the following days, Ye Tian used purple light to refine his physical body while contemplating the Great Immortal Technique.

Super comprehension, coupled with god-level super-comprehension talent, and with the assistance of the great god's arithmetic deduction, Ye Tian's speed of comprehending the Great Immortal Technique is very fast, although I don't know if I can step into the limit level, but it is not difficult to reach the consummation level.

In the blink of an eye, thousands of years have passed.

Ye Tian hadn't cultivated the Great Immortal Technique to the consummation realm, but something big had happened in the Purple Light World.
